description: Framework-agnostic component manifest for the Design System Starter Kit. Each entry describes a component at the design system level, not at a specific platform implementation level. The HTML/CSS layer is the source of truth; React and Web Components are wrappers on top.

components.name: ActionGroup
components.purpose: Groups related actions (buttons and links) horizontally or vertically with automatic wrapping.

components.name: Body
components.purpose: Applies document-level cascade base styles (typography, colour, background) when placed on the <body> element.

components.name: BreakoutSection
components.purpose: Breaks a section out of a constrained page width to span the full viewport width.

components.name: Container
components.purpose: Centring wrapper with max-width and inline padding for page layout.

components.name: Grid
components.purpose: 12-column CSS Grid container with gutter, margin, and optional constrained max-width.

components.name: Stack
components.purpose: Vertical stacking with consistent row spacing between direct children.

components.name: Hero
components.purpose: Prominent introduction section directly below the page header with full viewport width and configurable background.

components.name: Button
components.purpose: Triggers an action; communicates visual hierarchy and intent via variant.

components.name: ButtonLink
components.purpose: Semantically an <a> element, visually a Button; for navigation actions with high visual prominence.

components.name: LinkButton
components.purpose: Semantically a <button>, visually a Link; for low-prominence JavaScript actions.

components.name: Icon
components.purpose: Renders a named SVG icon from the system's icon registry.

components.name: Heading
components.purpose: Semantic heading element (h1–h6) with a decoupled visual appearance level.

components.name: Paragraph
components.purpose: Body text with lead, default, and small-print size variants.

components.name: Link
components.purpose: Hyperlink with optional icon support and automatic external link handling.

components.name: UnorderedList
components.purpose: Styled unordered list.

components.name: OrderedList
components.purpose: Styled ordered list.

components.name: Alert
components.purpose: Live region message that informs the user of an important status related to the current activity.

components.name: Note
components.purpose: Visually highlighted passive informational message; not a live region.

components.name: StatusBadge
components.purpose: Compact label communicating a status with a signal colour.

components.name: DotBadge
components.purpose: Small coloured dot that draws attention to a status change on a parent element, with an optional pulse animation.

components.name: NumberBadge
components.purpose: Compact inline element displaying a count (unread messages, pending tasks) inside a button or menu item.

components.name: Table
components.purpose: Accessible data table with a required caption, optional horizontal scroll wrapper, and CSS-based sort icon support.

components.name: Details
components.purpose: Expandable content disclosure using the native <details>/<summary> HTML pattern.

components.name: Image
components.purpose: Accessible image wrapper with lazy loading, fixed aspect ratios, and LCP priority support.

components.name: Card
components.purpose: Configurable container for structured content (image, heading, description, action) with an optional stretched-link interaction.

components.name: ModalDialog
components.purpose: Modal dialog for short focused actions; blocks the background via native <dialog> with a focus trap.

components.name: Drawer
components.purpose: Slide-in panel from the side of the viewport for secondary navigation or content.

components.name: Backdrop
components.purpose: Fixed full-screen decorative overlay behind a Modal Dialog or Drawer; always aria-hidden.

components.name: Spinner
components.purpose: Circular loading indicator for indeterminate wait times with role="status" and a required accessible label.

components.name: ProgressBar
components.purpose: Horizontal progress bar for determinate wait times with a visual percentage label.

components.name: File
components.purpose: Displays file metadata (name, type, size) with contextual upload states and an optional interactive variant.

components.name: Popover
components.purpose: Lightweight non-modal overlay anchored to a trigger element, light-dismissed via the HTML Popover API.

components.name: SummaryList
components.purpose: Semantic key-value list (<dl>) for form summaries and metadata overviews with a responsive grid layout.

components.name: Logo
components.purpose: Theme-aware inline SVG logo with design token colours that adapts automatically to every theme and colour mode.

components.name: SkipLink
components.purpose: First focusable element on the page, visible on keyboard focus to let users skip repeated navigation (WCAG 2.4.1).

components.name: BreadcrumbNavigation
components.purpose: Hierarchical navigation trail with a compact variant triggered via container query.

components.name: Menu
components.purpose: Container for MenuLink and MenuButton items in a vertical or horizontal navigation list.

components.name: MenuButton
components.purpose: Navigation button for JavaScript actions (logout, open modal); semantically a <button>, visually consistent with MenuLink.

components.name: MenuLink
components.purpose: Navigation link with level hierarchy (1–4), active page state, and expandable sub-navigation.

components.name: PageBody
components.purpose: Structural wrapper for main page content that fills available vertical space so PageFooter stays at the bottom.

components.name: PageFooter
components.purpose: Page footer with accent background, thick top border, and a 4-column grid layout.

components.name: PageHeader
components.purpose: Page-wide header bar with logo, navigation, and actions slots; theme-aware background via design tokens.

components.name: PageLayout
components.purpose: Full-page structural wrapper that vertically stacks PageHeader, PageBody, and PageFooter with min-height: 100dvh.

components.name: TextInput
components.purpose: Single-line text input with an optional wrapper for inline icons or prefix/suffix labels.

components.name: TextArea
components.purpose: Multi-line text input.

components.name: FileInput
components.purpose: File upload input with drag-and-drop support and multiple file selection.

components.name: EmailInput
components.purpose: Email address input with type="email" browser validation; extends TextInput styles.

components.name: PasswordInput
components.purpose: Password input with a show/hide toggle button; extends TextInput styles.

components.name: NumberInput
components.purpose: Numeric text input following the GOV.UK pattern; extends TextInput styles.

components.name: TelephoneInput
components.purpose: Telephone number input with type="tel"; extends TextInput styles.

components.name: SearchInput
components.purpose: Search input with an inline search icon and a suppressed native clear button.

components.name: TimeInput
components.purpose: Time input with an inline icon button that opens the native time picker.

components.name: DateInput
components.purpose: Date input with an inline calendar icon button that opens the native date picker.

components.name: Select
components.purpose: Native select dropdown with a custom chevron icon; extends TextInput wrapper styles.

components.name: DateInputGroup
components.purpose: Three separate day/month/year NumberInput fields; more accessible than a native date picker.

components.name: Checkbox
components.purpose: Custom styled checkbox with a visual check indicator.

components.name: Radio
components.purpose: Custom styled radio button with an inner circle indicator.

components.name: OptionLabel
components.purpose: Label element paired with a Checkbox or Radio control.

components.name: CheckboxOption
components.purpose: Composite of Checkbox and OptionLabel for a single labelled checkbox option.

components.name: RadioOption
components.purpose: Composite of Radio and OptionLabel for a single labelled radio option.

components.name: CheckboxGroup
components.purpose: Container for a group of CheckboxOption items; wrap in FormFieldset for accessible labelling.

components.name: RadioGroup
components.purpose: Container for a group of RadioOption items; wrap in FormFieldset for accessible labelling.

components.name: FormFieldLabel
components.purpose: Label element for a single form input; always paired with a FormField container.

components.name: FormFieldLegend
components.purpose: Legend element for a fieldset group; visually identical to FormFieldLabel.

components.name: FormFieldDescription
components.purpose: Helper text below a form label that provides additional context for the input.

components.name: FormFieldErrorMessage
components.purpose: Inline error message shown below a form input when validation fails.

components.name: FormFieldStatus
components.purpose: Status indicator for a form field showing default, positive, or warning state.

components.name: FormField
components.purpose: Container that assembles FormFieldLabel, FormFieldDescription, FormFieldErrorMessage, FormFieldStatus, and a single form input.

components.name: FormFieldset
components.purpose: Fieldset/legend container for groups of form controls such as CheckboxGroup or RadioGroup.
